name: Codex Deep Research
sourceTypes: credible market maps and industry research
user interviews, surveys, and qualitative studies
community discussion, job posts, and workflow evidence
constraints: Prefer primary evidence over generic market claims.
Do not present TAM math without stating the assumptions behind it.
Separate direct competitors from adjacent substitutes and in-house workflows.
Write the recommendation crisply enough that a founder can decide whether the idea deserves to exist.
